ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-18-2023 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Phillip D. Batchelder, via Zoom, for John J. McGuire, III, Petitioner.

The court acknowledges that there are no appearances to object to the petition for probate of will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Sep-29-2014 and Codicil dated Sep-30-2014 are admitted to probate. John J. McGuire, III is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-18-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-25-2022 Continued To Aug-29-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
